name: Potato Pancakes #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the raw potatoes; drain off all water.
2. Put the potatoes into a large bowl and add the onion, eggs, and seasoning (salt, pepper, and any other desired seasonings). Mix well.
3. Add the matzo meal/flour to the potato mixture and mix until combined.
4. Heat the cooking fat in a medium frying pan.
5. Drop about 1 1/2 tablespoons of the potato mixture into the hot fat for each pancake.
6. Spread the mixture thin to make larger pancakes, which will be lighter and tastier.
7. Fry the pancakes until golden brown on one side, then turn them over and fry the other side until golden brown as well.
8. Serve with applesauce or sour cream.
9. Pancakes can be frozen between sheets of foil and reheated in a 450 degree oven for about 15 minutes until hot and crisp.
